name: Refresh FX rates
_notes: Fetches latest rates from open.er-api.com (free tier, no key), inverts them to 'INR per 1 unit of code' to match public.currencies.fx_rate semantics, then calls update_currency_fx_rates.
If you swap providers (e.g. Open Exchange Rates, exchangerate.host), only the 'Fetch rates' node + the 'Build payload' Function need updates.
